title: Amtech - 14-30mm Bi-Metal Holesaw Hex Arbour for Stable Drilling and Clean Cuts through Wood, Metal, and Plastic, Home DIY, Durable and Easy to Attach, Includes 6mm Pilot Hole Drill Bit
features: COMPATIBILITY: Designed to be compatible with Amtech Bi-metal holesaws ranging from 14mm to 30mm, providing flexibility for various drilling tasks.
EASILY ATTACHABLE: The hex arbour fits securely into drill chucks between 3/8 inch and 1/2 inch, ensuring a stable and efficient connection during operation.
INCLUDES PILOT DRILL BIT: Comes complete with a removable 6mm pilot hole drill bit, enabling precise and accurate starts for clean holes.
VERSATILE USAGE: Ideal for use with different materials, including wood, plastic, and metal, making it a reliable choice for various DIY and professional projects.
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Engineered for long-lasting performance, this arbour is built to withstand the demands of regular use.
description: Product Description The arbour is ideal for using on various materials, including wood, metal, and plastic. It’s compatible with holesaws ranging from 14mm to 30mm for added convenience. The arbour easily attaches to drill chucks between ⅜ inch and ½ inch to ensure stability and ease of use. The included removable 6mm pilot hole drill bit helps to guide the holesaw, reducing the risk of wandering for clean cuts every time. The arbour is built to withstand the rigours of frequent use for a long-lasting and reliable performance.
